title: Navigate the Gauntlet
description: Navigate to 5 specific locations in a file using only motions from Week 1
tasks: Jump to the email value (use /email then f")
Jump to the word 'build' in scripts (use ?build)
hints: Use gg to go to top, G to go to bottom
f jumps to a character on the current line

title: The Transformation
description: Transform a JavaScript object into a TypeScript interface using operators and text objects
hints: Start by changing 'const user =' to 'interface User' using cw
Use ci" to change string values to their types
The dot command (.) repeats your last change

title: Column Commander
description: Use block visual mode to add a prefix to multiple lines
startingCode:
name
email
age
role
isActive
createdAt
updatedAt
expectedCode:
user.name
user.email
user.age
user.role
user.isActive
user.createdAt
user.updatedAt
hints: Use Ctrl-v to enter block visual mode
Press I to insert at the beginning of each selected line
Type 'user.' then Escape — it applies to all lines

title: Search and Replace
description: Use substitution commands to refactor variable names
hints: Use :%s/url/endpoint/g to rename url to endpoint
Use :%s/data/response/g to rename data to response
Be careful: 'data' appears in 'getData' — use word boundaries: :%s/\<data\>/response/g
